scripts.build:wasm: pnpm gen:params && cargo build -p wasm-audio --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs release && node scripts/check-wasm-exports.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:dev: pnpm gen:params && cargo build -p wasm-audio --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && node scripts/copy-wasm.mjs debug && node scripts/check-wasm-exports.mjs
scripts.check: cargo check --workspace && pnpm --filter web check && pnpm check:params-sync
